name: place
description: 以指定位置为生成原点，放置已配置的地物、结构地物、结构模板或结构池
syntax: /place jigsaw [pool: string] [jigsawTarget: string] maxDepth [pos: x y z] [keepJigsaws: Boolean]
/place jigsaw [pool: string] [jigsawTarget: string] maxDepth [pos: x y z]
/place structure [structure_feature: string] [pos1: x y z] [ignoreStartHeight: Boolean] [keepJigsaws: Boolean]
/place structure [structure_feature: string] [pos1: x y z] [ignoreStartHeight: Boolean]

jigsaw.description: 放置结构池并展开至指定深度

data.name: jigsaw
data.description: 放置结构池并展开至指定深度

[pool: string].description: 要放置的结构池(文件路径)

[jigsawTarget: string].description: 放置结构池时的结构中的起始拼图方块

maxDepth.description: 要展开拼图方块的最大深度(1~7)

data.name: maxDepth
data.description: 要展开拼图方块的最大深度(1~7)

[pos: x y z].description: 放置时使用的生成原点

[keepJigsaws: Boolean].description: 被放置结构是否保留拼图方块，默认为false

[pos1: x y z].description: 放置时使用的生成原点

[ignoreStartHeight: Boolean].description: 放置结构时是否忽略起始高度
